name: vibe-audit
description: Tab-by-tab Playwright audit for vibe-coded apps. Finds what the AI said was working but isn't — then generates a living test suite.
author: loveshotsmedia

commands.name: vibe-audit
commands.description: Run a full tab-by-tab Playwright audit of your vibe-coded app

engines.name: audit-engine
engines.install: npm install && npx playwright install chromium
